examples: He ran straight into them - denim blazing with silver embroidery, serape dresses, gaucho pants with side vents of creamy silk.
There was also a pantsuit inspired by the outfit of a bullfighter worn under a multi-colored striped serape.
Each dancer wears a carved wooden mask with headdress, serape, embroidered shawl and multicoloured ribbons, and plays chinchines (maracas).
